blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked

blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add evidence for work order generation across all equipment types
Provide concrete evidence that failed inspections for all equipment types trigger work orders and lockouts.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that a failed item should trigger a work order or equipment lockout. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a forklift fails inspection and is locked out, it does not provide evidence that this behavior is consistently applied across all relevant equipment types or that the system generates work orders for all failed inspections. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not confirm the requirement's applicability beyond the specific forklift scenario.
gaps: No evidence that failed items consistently trigger work orders or equipment lockouts for all equipment types.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for work order generation across all equipment types
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete evidence that failed inspections for all equipment types trigger work orders and lockouts.
